name: Sunny Apricot Marbles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the apricots, pecans, coconut flakes, and pre-cooked Bits-O-Barley in a blender.
2. Process until well combined.
3. Remove the mixture from the blender and transfer it to a mixing bowl.
4. Add lemon juice and honey.
5. Shape the mixture into balls.
6. Roll the balls in additional chopped nuts.
7. Refrigerate until set.
